name: core.openwop.agents.long-doc-summarizer
description: Long-document summarizer using map-reduce. Splits input into chunks, summarizes each, then synthesizes a final summary. Handles documents that exceed any single LLM's context window. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP Working Group

agents.label: Long Document Summarizer Agent
agents.description: Map-reduce summarizer. Splits input into chunks via openwop:core.flow.split-in-batches, summarizes each chunk independently, then synthesizes a final summary. Handles inputs beyond a single LLM context window.
